Best Calming Treats for Dogs 2026: Anxiety Relief That Works

Published on March 4, 2026

⚠️ Affiliate Disclosure: This post may contain affiliate links. We earn a commission if you make a purchase, at no extra cost to you.

Quick Summary

After testing 12+ calming treats, here are our top picks for 2026:

🏆 Top Pick: Zesty Paws Calming Bites

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.7/5

Best for: Separation anxiety, thunderstorms

Price: $24.97 for 90 chews

Signs of Dog Anxiety

  • Excessive barking
  • Destructive behavior
  • Pacing or restlessness
  • Panting or drooling
  • Hiding or trembling

Top Picks

1. Zesty Paws Calming Bites - Best Overall

Pros: Natural ingredients, dogs love the taste, affordable

Cons: May take time to work

Check Price on Amazon →

2. VetriScience Composure - Best Vet Recommended

Pros: Veterinarian formulated, clinically studied

Cons: Higher price, smaller chews

Check Price on Amazon →

3. PetHonesty Calming Hemp Chews - Best with Hemp

Pros: Includes hemp, natural ingredients

Cons: Hemp may not work for all dogs

Check Price on Amazon →

Key Ingredients to Look For

  • L-Theanine - promotes relaxation
  • L-Tryptophan - supports calm behavior
  • Chamomile - natural calming herb
  • Valerian Root - reduces anxiety
  • Hemp - may help with stress

FAQ

How long until calming treats work?

Some work in 30-60 minutes. Others need 1-2 weeks of daily use.

Are calming treats safe?

Yes, when used as directed. Consult your vet for severe anxiety.

Can I give these daily?

Most calming treats are safe for daily use. Follow package guidelines.
